Localization.Description: Attempt to remove a file object

EventDescriptions.EventDescription: The file object with inode {object.id} is removed on host {event_src.host}
User {subject.account.name} removed the file object with inode {object.id} on host {event_src.host}
The user with ID {subject.account.id} failed to remove a file object on host {event_src.host}. Reason: {reason}.
User {subject.account.name} as {object.account.name} removed the file object with inode {object.id} on host {event_src.host}
The user with ID {subject.account.id} removed file object "{object.fullpath}" on host {event_src.host}
The user with ID {subject.account.id} removed the file object with inode {object.id} on host {event_src.host}
User {subject.account.name} removed file object "{object.fullpath}" on host {event_src.host}
User {subject.account.name} as {object.account.name} removed file object "{object.fullpath}" on host {event_src.host}
User {subject.account.name} failed to remove a file object on host {event_src.host}. Reason: {reason}.
Failed to remove a file object on host {event_src.host}. Reason: {reason}.
User {subject.account.name} as {object.account.name} failed to remove a file object on host {event_src.host}. Reason: {reason}.
File object "{object.fullpath}" is removed on host {event_src.host}
